name: External API PM2.5 method for D3-02
description: Teaching PM2.5 endpoint method for D3-02. One country-specific row per consumer location, with the intake-fraction archetype chosen from the elementary-flow categories: urban air close to ground -> urban; non-urban air or from high stacks and generic air -> rural; low population density, long-term and lower stratosphere + upper troposphere -> remote. The CF is evaluated through a live Open-Meteo PM2.5 background concentration plus a simple intake-fraction x effect-factor decomposition.
